_readme.$description: Primitive tokens based on Radix UI Colors. No UX meaning — semantic usage defined in semantic.tokens.json. Usage recommendations per step: 1-2=App/Component backgrounds, 3-4=Interactive backgrounds (hover/pressed), 5-6=Borders & separators, 7-8=Subtle fills & muted text, 9-10=Solid fills (brand, CTA), 11-12=High-contrast text & icons.

11.$description: Accessible text/action — interactive teal. 5.14:1 on gray.1 #fcfcfc, WCAG AA. See ADR-050 (corrects #008573 = 4.45:1 on the real background).

9.$description: Solid background — brand accent / CTA secondaire

_readme.$value: Brand Accent — custom rose-coral palette. See ADR-024.
_readme.$description: Accent brand palette. Step 9 = solid CTA. Step 11 = text on light background (7.1:1 WCAG AA). Steps 1-2 = subtle backgrounds.

7.$description: UI element border and focus ring

9.$description: Solid dark background — 12.2:1 with white text

_readme.$value: Brand Secondary — custom burgundy palette. See ADR-024.
_readme.$description: Secondary brand palette. Step 9 (#463239) is very dark (L≈20) — solid background with white text (12:1). Step 12 = high-readability text on a light background (13.8:1 WCAG AAA).

_readme.$value: Agentica logo colors — fixed brand values, do not modify without Design approval.
_readme.$description: The three colors of the Agentica logo. Only these brand tokens are allowed to reference #000000 and #6B7280 directly.

0.$description: Pure white — surface background, text on action/danger

500.$description: Accessible disabled text — 4.54:1 on white (WCAG AA). Not present in Radix gray. See ADR-017.

900.$description: Raised dark surface — tooltips, popovers on an inverse background. Tailwind neutral.900-ish. See ADR-046.

950.$description: Deepest dark surface — inverse banners/footer. Tailwind neutral.950-ish. See ADR-046.

7.$description: White alpha 80%
Black alpha 50%

0.$description: 4px × 0.5 — sub-grid half-step, reserved for compact components (e.g. badge.sm)

_readme.$value: Minor Third scale (ratio 1.200), rounded to a multiple of 4px. rem unit for accessibility (browser zoom). See ADR-023.

sm.$description: 14px — Labels, metadata, helper text. Line-height: reading (1.6)

6xl.$description: 60px — Marketing display (Minor Third ×7, ×1.2 of 5xl). Reserved for the Narrative Marketing context.

extrabold.$description: Extrabold — display/hero scale headings, heaviest weight used in the type system

reading.$description: Reading — body text, labels, details (≤ base). WCAG 1.4.12 compliant.

heading.$description: Intermediate headings (lg, xl, 2xl — h5 to h3).

tighter.$description: Very tight — large display numbers/digits (stats, KPIs). Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-tighter), wired to the token (ADR-068).

tight.$description: Tight — h1 headings outside the hero. Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-tight), wired to the token (ADR-068).

snug.$description: Slightly tight — logo, secondary stat numbers, home section headings. Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-snug), wired to the token (ADR-068).

heading.$description: Subtle tightening — h2 headings, ADR page titles. Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-heading), wired to the token (ADR-068).

relaxed.$description: Slightly wide — language buttons, contrast table headers. Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-wide), renamed "relaxed" to avoid colliding with the existing "wide" primitive (0.06em ≠ 0.04em). Wired to the token (ADR-068).

wide.$description: Wide — small caps/uppercase labels (e.g. language indicator) where spacing compensates for the reduced readability of uppercase text.

label.$description: Wide — uppercase property/metadata labels (prop-label, adr-meta-item, step/density card label). Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-label), wired to the token (ADR-068).

loose.$description: Very wide — uppercase audience label. Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-loose), wired to the token (ADR-068).

overline.$description: Overline — uppercase contextual badges/tags (pipeline-tag, context-badge, toc-title…). Pre-existing site value (--agtc-tracking-overline), wired to the token (ADR-068).

widest.$description: Very wide — marketing eyebrow label (uppercase, small size, strong emphasis). Pre-existing value (--agtc-tracking-eyebrow) preserved, wired to the token (ADR-067). Named "widest" (not "wider") to avoid colliding with --agtc-tracking-wider (0.06em, un-tokenized site scale).

base.$description: Main font — optimized for low vision, maximum differentiation of ambiguous characters (WCAG)

mono.$description: Police monospace — code, tokens CSS, valeurs techniques (ADR-028)

xl.$description: Feature icon — marketing cards, hook sections (4px grid: 8×4)

_readme.$value: Density factors for spacing. See ADR-025. Used via math tokens in semantic.json with floor/ceil to guarantee 4px alignment (Sam's math equations technique, ADR-025).

normal.$description: Normal density — forms, settings, everyday SaaS use

comfortable.$description: Comfortable density — marketing, onboarding, reading pages (+25%)

compact.$description: Compact density — dashboards, data tables, pro tools (−25%)

grid-unit.$description: Grid divisor for floor/ceil rounding. floor(value * factor / grid-unit) * grid-unit guarantees a multiple of 4px. See ADR-020 and ADR-025.
